no: Thrown Hammers mod by Sam/Miloch. Adds thrown hammer weapon type with animations and items. cn:15 (Spiritual Hammers) conflicts with aTweaks cn:102 — choose one. All components except cn:0 require main component.
ic: Spritual hammer component is incompatible with Spell Revisions

conflicts.reason: Component 15 (Thrown Spiritual Hammers) is incompatible with SR — SR completely redesigns Spiritual Hammer and the thrown patch causes damage to glitch to 0. Components 0, 25, 35, 50 are unaffected.
conflicts.source: Mod ic field, SHS forum thread, tp2 analysis. Only comp 15 conflicts; other 4 components (0, 25, 35, 50) work fine with SR. 2026-03

spells: Spiritual Hammer gains returning throw ability
Spiritual Hammer gains thrown weapon behavior

sum: Adds thrown hammer animations and a few items to most IE games.

co.no: Core thrown hammer system. Adds returning thrown hammers as a new weapon type with animations. Required by all other components. Install in SPELL MODS — must be BEFORE aTweaks (PRE-TACTICAL, ord:210) if using Thrown Spiritual Hammers.

Converts Spiritual Hammer spell to create throwable hammers. CONFLICT with aTweaks cn:102 (ranged force weapon) — both modify shamme*.itm files. Hammers installs first (SPELL MODS ord:170), aTweaks overwrites after (PRE-TACTICAL ord:210). If using both, aTweaks wins. Choose one approach. Not .
Adds mundane throwing hammers to shops and creature inventories.
Adds +1 throwing daggers, axes, and hammers to shops and creature inventories.
Adds several magic throwing hammers as unique items.
